days.text: Very hot. Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. A few thundery showers later. Force 2 to 4 east to northeasterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. A few showers at first. Force 2 to 3 east to southeasterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. One or two showers. Force 2 to 4 south to southwesterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. One or two showers. Force 2 to 4 south to southwesterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. One or two showers. Force 2 to 4 south to southwesterly winds.
